creator: jflemer@alum.rpi.edu
text:
The upstream project for this port has been stalled since 2006, and does not
support amd64.  There is a user contributed patch set on the SF.net
tracker[1] for amd64.

[1]
http://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&aid=2779880&group_id=22615&atid=375631

(Parts of) the above patch should be adapted for/tested on fbsd/amd64.  I'm
not able to do that right now though.

-James

On Mon, May 17, 2010 at 05:45, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Dear maintainer of net-mgmt/docsis,
>
> a problem report has been submitted for your port for which your
> feedback might be required; its contents can be found at [1]. If it
> contains a patch or suggestions for a change, please send a followup to
> the PR explaining whether or not you approve it and want it to be
> committed.
>
> Regards,
> Stefan
>
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140303
>
